"#!/bin/bash
set -e

DISPLAY=:0 WAYLAND_DISPLAY=wayland-0 scrcpy -s RZCY80G86FP --stay-awake"

"#!/bin/bash
set -e
APK_PATH=$(find /home/architit/LAM_CORE/RADRILONIUMA/modules/antigravity_auth/build/outputs/apk/debug/ -name "*.apk" | head -n 1)
echo "Installing Antigravity Auth module..."
adb -s RZCY80G86FP install -r "$APK_PATH" > /dev/null

echo "Waking up screen..."
adb -s RZCY80G86FP shell input keyevent KEYCODE_WAKEUP
sleep 1

# Clear logcat
adb -s RZCY80G86FP logcat -c

echo "Triggering Biometric Auth..."
adb -s RZCY80G86FP shell am start -n com.radriloniuma.auth/.AuthActivity > /dev/null

echo "Waiting for STRICT BIOMETRIC AUTHENTICATION on the device..."
# This command will block until ANTIGRAVITY_AUTH_SUCCESS is logged
adb -s RZCY80G86FP logcat -m 1 -e "ANTIGRAVITY_AUTH_SUCCESS"

echo "Authentication passed! Starting scrcpy remote session..."
DISPLAY=:0 WAYLAND_DISPLAY=wayland-0 scrcpy -s RZCY80G86FP --stay-awake"
